description: A vertical, portrait-orientation graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor about apprenticeships. The background is a full-color photograph of a training scene: a young Black man in the foreground wearing clear safety goggles and a dark navy shirt looks downward, while at right an older white man, also in clear safety goggles and a dark shirt, leans in; equipment (a yellow upright apparatus, tubing, a metal canister) is visible. The lower portion fades to a deep navy gradient. Overlaid in large bold white sans-serif text is text on two lines: 'Earn as you learn with apprenticeship,' and below it, in white, the URL 'apprenticeship.gov.' The white embossed Department of Labor circular seal ('Department of Labor, United States of America') appears at the lower right.
notable_text: Earn as you learn with apprenticeship - apprenticeship.gov
